experience.title: Information Technology Specialist GS11
experience.description: Manage the assigned IT/communications environment with privileged access at the network level for the Wing, Geographically Separated Units (GSU), and Tenants.

experience.title: Cyber Transport/ Client Systems Workcenter Supervisor
experience.description: Manage Cyber Transport/Client Systems work center personnel.

experience.title: F-16 Ejection System Technician
experience.description: Troubleshot, removed, tested, inspected, repaired, modified, and installed explosive and non-explosive components and assemblies on ejection systems.

extra_fields.certifications: USAF, Electronic Principles, USAF, Telephone Systems Apprentice Course, USAF, Aircrew Egress Systems Apprentice Course
extra_fields.awards: Superior Performer, 2nd Quarter 2003; USAF Achievement Medal, June 2000; Humanitarian Service Medal, January 1998; 20 CRS Maintenance Professional of the Year, 1998; Airman of the Quarter, May 1997; Airman of the Month, March 1997; Airman of the Month, February 1997
